name: Factor(UT): Untrusted Decomposer
description: AAAI 2026 workshop paper. Separation of task decomposition and implementation to detect deceptive AI planning. Implementation-level monitoring achieves AUROC 0.96 vs. 0.52 for plan-only monitoring.

name: DeceptionScoop
description: Side-channel profiler for deceptive LLM intent. Detects the cognitive cost of lying via latency spikes, token entropy shifts, and GPU power variance. Task-adaptive suspicion model, not a brittle classifier.

name: POP2 Protein Expression
description: 735 μg POP2 expression yield in yeast and E. coli using AI-assisted parameter search, plasmid design heuristics, and iterative lab protocols. CURC Highest Honors. Led 10-person team at CSU United in STEMM.

name: CryoProtect
description: Computational cryoprotectant discovery workflow. PostgreSQL database of 9,495 molecules with RDKit fingerprint similarity search (Numba-optimized), ETL from PubChem/ChEMBL, and DreaMS-style transformer embedding architecture.

name: Control Technologies Ltd
description: P&ID design for automated brewery control. CCTV-PLC monitoring for compliance. Industrial automation workflow optimization.

name: LAS Retail
description: Founded and operated the first specialty retail smoke shop in Trinidad. Mapped U.S. 2018 Farm Bill regulations onto a local legal gray zone. End-to-end operations: supplier sourcing, compliance, inventory, customer acquisition. Clean shutdown and exit to relocate internationally.
